channel.title: NABK Tirupakuzhi Vijayaraghavan, V Jha, D Rajbhandari, SN Myatra, O John, A Ghosh, A Bassi, S Arfin, M Kunigari, R Joshi, L Donaldson, N Hammond, B Venkatesh, NA | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NABK Tirupakuzhi Vijayaraghavan, V Jha, D Rajbhandari, SN Myatra, O John, A Ghosh, A Bassi, S Arfin, M Kunigari, R Joshi, L Donaldson, N Hammond, B Venkatesh, NA

image.title: NABK Tirupakuzhi Vijayaraghavan, V Jha, D Rajbhandari, SN Myatra, O John, A Ghosh, A Bassi, S Arfin, M Kunigari, R Joshi, L Donaldson, N Hammond, B Venkatesh, NA

item.title: Hydroxychloroquine plus personal protective equipment versus standard personal protective equipment alone for the prevention of COVID-19 infections among frontline healthcare workers: the HydrOxychloroquine Prophylaxis Evaluation(HOPE) trial: A structured summary of a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
